languages.text: "Заключаю феномен, что ты именуешь Номосом, в тессеракт для последующей транспортировки в Музеон. Феномен пробудет в этом узилище до тех пор, пока я не подготовлю все необходимое, чтобы навсегда запечатлить его в виде экспоната, неподвластного энтропии".

traits.locale_text: "Заключаю феномен, что ты именуешь Номосом, в тессеракт для последующей транспортировки в Музеон. Феномен пробудет в этом узилище до тех пор, пока я не подготовлю все необходимое, чтобы навсегда запечатлить его в виде экспоната, неподвластного энтропии".

languages.text: "I am enclosing the phenomenon you call Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museion. The phenomenon will remain confined until I have prepared everything necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."
languages.original_text: "Заключаю феномен, что ты именуешь Номосом, в тессеракт для последующей транспортировки в Музеон. Феномен пробудет в этом узилище до тех пор, пока я не подготовлю все необходимое, чтобы навсегда запечатлить его в виде экспоната, неподвластного энтропии".

traits.locale_text: "I am enclosing the phenomenon you name Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museon. The phenomenon shall remain imprisoned until I have prepared all that is necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."

"I am enclosing the phenomenon you name Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museon. The phenomenon shall remain imprisoned until I have prepared all that is necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."

"I am enclosing the phenomenon you call Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museion. The phenomenon shall remain confined until I have prepared everything necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."

"I am enclosing the phenomenon you call Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museion. The phenomenon shall remain confined until I have prepared everything necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."

"I am enclosing the phenomenon you call Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museion. The phenomenon will remain confined until I have prepared everything necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."

languages.text: "Ich packe das Phänomen, das Ihr als Nomos bezeichnet, für den Transport in das Museion in einen Tesserakt. Das Phänomen bleibt eingesperrt, bis ich alle nötigen Maßnahmen getroffen habe, um es dauerhaft als Exponat zu bewahren, das gegen die Verheerungen der Entropie immun ist."
languages.original_text: "I am enclosing the phenomenon you call Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museion. The phenomenon will remain confined until I have prepared everything necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."

traits.locale_text: "Ich packe das Phänomen, das Ihr als Nomos bezeichnet, für den Transport in das Museion in einen Tesserakt. Das Phänomen bleibt eingesperrt, bis ich alle nötigen Maßnahmen getroffen habe, um es dauerhaft als Exponat zu bewahren, das gegen die Verheerungen der Entropie immun ist."

languages.text: “我正在将你们称为诺莫斯的现象封入超立方体，以便之后运往陈列馆。该现象将被一直封存，直到我准备好一切必要设施，将其永久保存为一件不受熵侵蚀的展品。”
languages.original_text: "I am enclosing the phenomenon you call Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museion. The phenomenon will remain confined until I have prepared everything necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."

traits.locale_text: “我正在将你们称为诺莫斯的现象封入超立方体，以便之后运往陈列馆。该现象将被一直封存，直到我准备好一切必要设施，将其永久保存为一件不受熵侵蚀的展品。”

languages.text: « Je confine le phénomène que vous appelez Nomos dans un tesseract pour le transporter jusqu'au Muséion. Il y restera enfermé jusqu'à ce que j'aie terminé les préparatifs nécessaires pour le conserver éternellement sous forme de pièce d'exposition protégée par les ravages de l'entropie. »
languages.original_text: "I am enclosing the phenomenon you call Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museion. The phenomenon will remain confined until I have prepared everything necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."

traits.locale_text: « Je confine le phénomène que vous appelez Nomos dans un tesseract pour le transporter jusqu'au Muséion. Il y restera enfermé jusqu'à ce que j'aie terminé les préparatifs nécessaires pour le conserver éternellement sous forme de pièce d'exposition protégée par les ravages de l'entropie. »

languages.text: «Estoy aislando el fenómeno al que llamas Nomos en el interior de un teseracto para su posterior traslado al Museion. El fenómeno permanecerá confinado hasta que lo haya dispuesto todo para preservarlo a perpetuidad como parte de mi exposición, inmune a los estragos de la entropía».
languages.original_text: "I am enclosing the phenomenon you call Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museion. The phenomenon will remain confined until I have prepared everything necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy aislando el fenómeno al que llamas Nomos en el interior de un teseracto para su posterior traslado al Museion. El fenómeno permanecerá confinado hasta que lo haya dispuesto todo para preservarlo a perpetuidad como parte de mi exposición, inmune a los estragos de la entropía».

languages.text: "Nomos dediğin fenomeni, daha sonra Museion'a taşınmak üzere bir teseraktın içine hapsediyorum. Fenomen; entropinin tahribatlarına karşı bağışık, bir sergi parçası olarak kalıcı şekilde korunması için gerekli her şeyi hazırlayana dek kapalı kalacak."
languages.original_text: "I am enclosing the phenomenon you call Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museion. The phenomenon will remain confined until I have prepared everything necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."

traits.locale_text: "Nomos dediğin fenomeni, daha sonra Museion'a taşınmak üzere bir teseraktın içine hapsediyorum. Fenomen; entropinin tahribatlarına karşı bağışık, bir sergi parçası olarak kalıcı şekilde korunması için gerekli her şeyi hazırlayana dek kapalı kalacak."

languages.text: 「ノモスという現象を、四次元空間の中に収容し、その後、ミューシオンに輸送します。この現象は、永久に展示物として保存するために必要なものが整うまで、収容されたままになります。それは、エントロピーの破壊から守られたものです。」
languages.original_text: "I am enclosing the phenomenon you call Nomos within a tesseract for subsequent transport to the Museion. The phenomenon will remain confined until I have prepared everything necessary to preserve it permanently as an exhibit, one immune to the ravages of entropy."

traits.locale_text: 「ノモスという現象を、四次元空間の中に収容し、その後、ミューシオンに輸送します。この現象は、永久に展示物として保存するために必要なものが整うまで、収容されたままになります。それは、エントロピーの破壊から守られたものです。」
